sections.paragraph:
[Pashur], pr.n.-

(1) of a priest, co-temporary with Jeremiah, Jer 20:3 38:1 to the signification of which allusion is made, loc. cit.; namely, prosperity everywhere (from פשׁח Arab. فسح to be wide, ample; and סְחֹור round about). Opp. to מָגֹור מִסָּבִיב.-(2) Jer 21:1.-(3) Ezr 2:38 10:22 Neh 7:41 10:4 .
